nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses and Aaron, “Take for yourselves handfuls of soot from a kiln, and let Moses throw it toward the sky in the sight of Pharaoh.

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses and Aaron, “Take handfuls of soot from the kiln, and let Moses throw them in the air in the sight of Pharaoh.

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：“你們要兩手拿滿爐灰，摩西要在法老眼前把爐灰向天上揚起來。

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西和亚伦说：“你们去取几把窑里的灰，摩西要在法老面前把灰抛向空中。
